generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are quietly reducing their defense budgets while expecting us to bear the burden? This isn't just about money—it's about our safety. When partners don't pull their weight, our deterrence weakens, and we become more vulnerable. We can't afford to be the only ones committed to our collective security. It's time to hold our allies accountable and ensure they contribute fairly. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
